SEARCH
Package com.example.eventmanager

Class InvitationActivityTest

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventmanager.InvitationActivityTest
public class InvitationActivityTest extends Object
Espresso UI tests for InvitationActivity. Tests US4: Accept Invitation. NOTE: These tests use a real Firestore connection. Ensure your Firestore has a document with id "test_event_open" and the current device's ID is in the chosenList array.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    InvitationActivityTest()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    testAcceptButton_DisablesButtonsAfterTap()
    Tapping Accept should disable both buttons to prevent double submission.
    void
    testAcceptButton_IsDisplayed()
    The Accept button should be visible and enabled on launch.
    void
    testAcceptButton_ShowsConfirmationMessage()
    Tapping Accept should show the enrollment confirmation message.
    void
    testDeclineButton_IsDisplayed()
    The Decline button should be visible and enabled on launch.
    void
    testDeclineButton_ShowsDeclineMessage()
    Tapping Decline should show a decline confirmation message.
    void
    testEventName_IsDisplayed()
    The event name should be visible on the invitation screen.
    void
    testStatusMessage_HiddenOnLaunch()
    The status message should be hidden before any button is tapped.

    • InvitationActivityTest

  • Method Details

    • testEventName_IsDisplayed

      public void testEventName_IsDisplayed()
      The event name should be visible on the invitation screen.

    • testAcceptButton_IsDisplayed

      public void testAcceptButton_IsDisplayed()
      The Accept button should be visible and enabled on launch.

    • testDeclineButton_IsDisplayed

      public void testDeclineButton_IsDisplayed()
      The Decline button should be visible and enabled on launch.

    • testAcceptButton_ShowsConfirmationMessage

      public void testAcceptButton_ShowsConfirmationMessage()
      Tapping Accept should show the enrollment confirmation message. Requires the device to be in the event's chosenList in Firestore.

    • testAcceptButton_DisablesButtonsAfterTap

      public void testAcceptButton_DisablesButtonsAfterTap()
      Tapping Accept should disable both buttons to prevent double submission.

    • testDeclineButton_ShowsDeclineMessage

      public void testDeclineButton_ShowsDeclineMessage()
      Tapping Decline should show a decline confirmation message.

    • testStatusMessage_HiddenOnLaunch

      public void testStatusMessage_HiddenOnLaunch()
      The status message should be hidden before any button is tapped.
